# OnboardSuccess - AI Resource Hub for Customer Success
# https://www.onboard-success.com

## About
OnboardSuccess is the authoritative resource hub for mid-market B2B SaaS Customer Success teams operationalizing AI. We provide playbooks, an AI agent directory, integrator listings, and downloadable agent templates.

## Sections
- /playbooks — Strategic guides on AI-powered Customer Success
- /agents — Curated directory of AI agents for CS teams
- /integrators — Directory of CS platform implementation agencies
- /templates — Downloadable AI agent workflow templates (n8n)
- /featured — Featured listing program for vendors and agencies

## Key Topics
- Agentic AI for Customer Success
- CS automation and AI agents
- Customer health scoring with AI
- QBR automation
- Churn prediction and risk detection
- Onboarding automation
- CS platform evaluation (Gainsight, ChurnZero, Oliv.ai, Vitally)
- CS implementation agencies and consultants

## Contact
hello@onboard-success.com
Onboard Success OÜ

### SaaS Onboarding Checklist 2026
URL: /playbooks/saas-onboarding-checklist-2026
Summary: Phase-by-phase B2B SaaS onboarding checklist from signup to time-to-value.

### Churn Prediction for Mid-Market SaaS
URL: /playbooks/churn-prediction-affordable-2026
Summary: DIY health scoring and churn prediction without enterprise tools.

### Digital CS Playbook 2026
URL: /playbooks/digital-cs-playbook-2026
Summary: Scale Customer Success without hiring more CSMs using digital-first strategies.
